question: Will Bitcoin hit a new all-time high before July 2026?
textDescription:
Will Bitcoin hit a new all-time high before July 2026?

Resolution criteria

This market resolves to YES if the price of Bitcoin (BTC) reaches a new all-time high (ATH) at any point on a major cryptocurrency exchange (such as Coinbase, Kraken, or Binance) before 12:00 AM UTC on July 1, 2026. Otherwise, it resolves to NO.

Resolution will be based on the daily closing price or real-time high data provided by reputable market aggregators such as CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko.

Background

Bitcoin's all-time high is the highest price point the asset has reached in its history. As of May 2026, traders and analysts monitor these levels closely, often referencing data from major exchanges to determine when a new peak has been established. This market focuses on whether the asset will exceed its historically highest recorded valuation within the specified timeframe.
